script: echo '===== Rosi creds.json shape (no values shown) =====' && jq 'keys' /home/azureuser/.rosi-bot/creds.json 2>&1; echo; echo '===== Test BF token using creds.json (per playbook step 2) =====' && APP=$(jq -r '.app_id // .APP_ID // .application_id // .client_id // .appId' /home/azureuser/.rosi-bot/creds.json 2>/dev/null); SEC=$(jq -r '.client_secret // .secret // .clientSecret' /home/azureuser/.rosi-bot/creds.json 2>/dev/null); TEN=$(jq -r '.tenant // .tenant_id // .tenantId' /home/azureuser/.rosi-bot/creds.json 2>/dev/null); echo "  APP from creds.json: $APP"; echo "  SEC length: ${#SEC}"; echo "  TEN: $TEN"; if [ -n "$APP" ] && [ -n "$SEC" ]; then curl -sS -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TEN/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SEC" --data-urlencode "grant_type=client_credentials" --data-urlencode "scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default" | jq '{ok: (has("access_token")), err: .error, msg: ((.error_description // "") | .[:120])}'; fi; unset SEC; echo; echo '===== Teams channel enabled? =====' && az resource show --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices/channels --name OpenClaw-RosiClaude/MsTeamsChannel --query "{enabled: properties.properties.isEnabled}" 2>&1 | head -10 || true; echo; echo '===== Compare with vault secret (just length) =====' && VS=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name rosi-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null); echo "  vault secret length: ${#VS}"; echo "  same as creds.json? $([ "$SEC" = "$VS" ] && echo yes || echo NO )"
